Test Description: Check default reset values and masked write/read semantics for registers addressed via addr_array, comparing against default_value_array with read_mask_array, and performing masked writes using write_mask_array; entries are conditionally skipped per skip_array and skip_rst_array; failures accumulate in def_fail_cnt and wr_fail_cnt and drive finish().
Test Steps/Procedure: Default value check: for i in [0..CNT-1], set addr=addr_array[i]; if skip_rst_array[i]==1 then continue; if read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 then continue; read data_rd=read_reg(addr) and mask with 0xFFFFFFFE as data; compare data==default_value_array[i]; on mismatch, increment def_fail_cnt and log; Write/read check: iterate test patterns data_wr over {0xFFFFFFFF,0xAAAAAAAA,0x55555555,0xF5F5F5F5,0xA5A5A5A5,0xFFFF0000}; for each i, if skip_array[i]==1 continue; if write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 continue; write write_reg(addr,(data_wr & write_mask_array[i])); then if write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 or read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 continue; read data_rd=(read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i]); compute wr_n=(write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xFFFFFFFF); compute exp_val=((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); if data_rd!=exp_val then increment wr_fail_cnt and log; at end, if (def_fail_cnt>0 || wr_fail_cnt>0) finish(1) else finish(0).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Default value acceptance: (read_reg(addr) & 0xFFFFFFFE) must equal default_value_array[i]; Write/read acceptance: (read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i]) must equal exp_val as computed; Overall: finish(0) indicates pass, finish(1) indicates failure.

Test Description: Enable group interrupt output in MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, configure per-pin control at MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4) with (1u<<20)|(1u<<18)|(1u<<16), clear MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1 and enable MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1 per-bit, then generate a negedge via writes to 0xA0243FFC and wait for ISR to clear int_pend; ISR validates MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 and clears per-pin and system raw statuses.
Test Steps/Procedure: Initialization: optionally enable GIC IRQ (87/88) per GPIO0/GPIO1; write MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1 with LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO0_INTR or LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO1_INTR; write 0xA0243FFC=0xFFFFFFFF; for i=0..31: set addr1=MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4); write_reg(addr1,(1u<<20)|(1u<<18)|(1u<<16)); wait_on(10); For each i: set wr_val=(1u<<i); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1,wr_val); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,wr_val); wait_on(10); set int_pend=1; drive 0xA0243FFC to 0xFFFFFFFF then to ~wr_val to create falling edge; poll with timeout (5000*wait_on(10)) until int_pend==0; Default_IRQHandler: compute local_wr=(1u<<i); set int_pend=0; read raddr=MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4); rdata=read_reg(raddr); if ((rdata & 0x1)!=0) then test_err++; if ((rdata & 0x2)!=0x0) then read rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); if ((rdata_grp & local_wr)==0) then test_err++; write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4),(1u<<20)|(1u<<16)); write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1,local_wr); read rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); expect 0x0; clear sysreg via write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1, LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR or LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR) and GIC_ClearIRQ(87/88).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Main loop acceptance: timeout must not expire while waiting for int_pend to clear; ISR acceptance: (rdata & 0x1)==0, (rdata & 0x2)!=0x0 implies (read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) & (1u<<i))!=0, after clearing MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_INTR_RAW_STCLR1 and per-pin bits, read of MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1 must be 0x0; finish(test_err) reports result.

Test Description: Enable group interrupt via MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1, program posedge interrupt per pin by writing 0x00020000 to MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4), set GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP[1..4] to 0x000000FF, enable MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1=0xFFFFFFFF, then generate rising edges using 0xA0243FFC and wait for ISR to clear int_pend; ISR checks MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1, clears per-pin raw via 0x00010000 writes, and clears MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1.
Test Steps/Procedure: Setup: optionally enable GIC IRQ (87/88); write MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1 with LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO0_INTR or LSS_SYSREG_INTR_EN1_GPIO1_INTR; for i=0..31 write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(i*4),0x00020000) to enable posedge; wait_on(10); configure IO control: write 0x000000FF to MIZAR_GPIO_GPIO_IO_CTRL_GROUP1..4; wait_on(10); enable group: write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0xFFFFFFFF); For each i: drive 0xA0243FFC=0x00000000, wait_on(10), set int_pend=1, drive 0xA0243FFC=0xFFFFFFFF to produce rising edge; poll with timeout (2000*wait_on(10)) until int_pend==0; after each iteration drive low again and wait; Default_IRQHandler: compute wr_val=(1<<i); set int_pend=0; read rdata_grp=read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1); mask group by write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1,0x00000000); if ((rdata_grp & 0xFFFFFFFF)!=0) then success else log error; clear per-pin raw by for j=0..31 write_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_GPIO_8+(j*4),0x00010000); wait_on(2); verify read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1)==0x0; clear sysreg via write_reg(MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1,LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO0_INTR or LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1_GPIO1_INTR) and confirm read back bit cleared; re-enable MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_EN1=0xFFFFFFFF; clear GIC IRQ (87/88).
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: Timeout in main loop must not trigger; in ISR, read_reg(MIZAR_GPIO_GP0_INTR1_INTR_STS1) must be non-zero upon entry and become 0x0 after raw/per-pin clears; post-write read of MIZAR_LSS_SYSREG_RAW_STCR1 must show the respective GPIO interrupt bit cleared; finish(test_err) reflects total errors.
